name: Flint Cragger
name_jp: フリント・クラッガー
desc: If this card is Special Summoned: You can discard 1 card, and if you do, send 1 "Fossil" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can send this card from the field to the GY; inflict 500 damage to your opponent, then, if "Fossil Fusion" is in your GY, you can return to your GY, 1 of your banished cards that is "Fossil Fusion" or mentions it. You can only use each effect of "Flint Cragger" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned: You can discard 1 card, and if you do, send 1 "Fossil" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to the GY. You can send this card from the field to the GY; inflict 500 damage to your opponent, then, if "Fossil Fusion" is in your GY, you can return to your GY, 1 of your banished cards that is "Fossil Fusion" or mentions it. You can only use each effect of "Flint Cragger" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
